THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERMAN, GEORGE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 550 BATTERY ST, #405, S.F, CA. $2,433.48 RENT, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,173.48, STAYED UNTIL NOV-16-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF. VACATES, LEAVES PREMISES CLEAN, REMOVES PERSONAL PROPERY & TURNS IN KEYS BY 11-16-93, 4PM, PL. WILL VACATE JUDGMENT. DEF. TO PAY $55 A MO STARTING 2-10-94 FOR 25 CON- SEC. MO. IF DEF MAKES ALL PMTS, PL. WILL DISM W/PREJUDICE. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
